title: The Big Picture Supramax Market
summary:
Main
By Nick Ristic
Supramaxes have now taken the lead as the highest-earning bulker size, as the geared ships continue to outperform larger vessels and benefit from the resurgence in economic activity around the world. Up and away
The Supramax market has gone from strength to strength so far this year, with these vessels now earning a premium over all of the other designs assessed by the Baltic Exchange. Since the start of the year, freight rates for these ships have surged by 138%to over $27,000 per day.
